trends.audience: Cat owners experiencing inappropriate elimination (peeing/pooping outside the litter box), especially multi-cat households
trends.raw_quote: We've tried everything — vet visits, different litter, different boxes, enzyme cleaners. My 6-year-old cat won't consistently use the litter box. I am at my wit's end and it's destroying my relationship with my cat.
trends.emotional_trigger: Helplessness + guilt — the owner feels like a failure, the cat is suffering, and the bond is fracturing
trends.product_direction: End-to-end litter box diagnosis guide: vet-first protocol, litter box optimization, stress reduction

trends.audience: First-time homeowners 1-6 months post-purchase experiencing overwhelm, regret, or 'new owner penalty'
trends.raw_quote: I regretted it at first. I was overwhelmed. handle safety stuff first, then chip away at the rest. it won't feel this overwhelming forever
trends.emotional_trigger: Buyer's remorse + paralysis by analysis — they don't know where to start and feel trapped
trends.product_direction: New homeowner triage guide: prioritize repairs, build a 90-day maintenance cadence, normalize the regret

trends.audience: Burned-out parents of toddlers and preschoolers, especially 'touched out' mothers
trends.raw_quote: My kids have broke me today. I feel like a failure for treating parenting like a chore.
trends.emotional_trigger: Shame + exhaustion — they know they're struggling but feel guilty admitting it
trends.product_direction: Boundary-setting guide for emotionally exhausted parents: practical reset strategies, permission structures
